data.answer: The covenant test uses the Leverage Ratio defined as Consolidated Total Debt divided by Adjusted EBITDA, not the naive ratio of debt to EBITDA before addbacks. Adjusted EBITDA of 985.0 includes $155 in Device Strategy addbacks and $45 in Quality addbacks, which are permitted under the amended definition of Permitted Addbacks [8], resulting in a Leverage Ratio of 3.066x, well below the 3.75x threshold under §6.6A [7].
